findings.term_jp: ホスティングサービス
findings.issue: ZH surface '主机托管服务' is wrong and collides with ハウジングサービス. Glossary canonical: '主机租用服务'.
ZH surface '服务器代管服务' on p200 deviates from glossary canonical '主机托管服务' (p198 is correct).

findings.term_jp: ハウジングサービスとホスティングサービス (figure caption)
findings.issue: Figure caption ZH = '主机托管服务与主机托管服务' — both services rendered identically, caption is semantically meaningless.
findings.current_zh: 主机托管服务与主机托管服务
findings.expected_zh: 主机托管服务与主机租用服务

findings.issue: JP surface abbreviated ('BPR') on p195 vs full expansion on p193 ('BPR（Business Process Reengineering：業務プロセスリエンジニアリング）'). Quiz-card context may be intentional but risks inconsistent surface lookup.
JP surface abbreviated ('BPM') on p195 vs full expansion on p193 ('BPM（Business Process Management：業務プロセス管理）'). Same pattern as BPR.
EN surface 'E-R Diagram' does not spell out 'Entity-Relationship'; learner may not make the connection. Low priority.
EN definition uses neutral 'Restructuring' framing without noting Japanese usage primarily connotes layoffs/workforce reduction. Minor nuance loss.

findings.term_jp: ホスティングサービス (figure p199::2 caption)
findings.issue: p199::2 ZH caption uses '主机租用服务' for ホスティング — this is CORRECT per glossary canonical, contrasting with wrong '主机托管服务' used on p198::2/p200::2. Supports fixing F01.

release_impact.reason: 3 FAIL findings: ホスティング ZH surface wrong on 2 pages + 1 figure caption semantically invalid due to collision. ハウジング ZH surface inconsistent on p200.
